info.title: Kubeasy CLI API
info.description: Public API for the Kubeasy platform consumed by the CLI. Web routes use session cookie authentication; CLI routes use Bearer token authentication.

SessionAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
SessionAuth.description: Session cookie set after login via better-auth

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained via `kubeasy login`. Used by the CLI and accepted on all public API routes.

422.description: Some objectives failed or missing/unknown objectives
